remarks: Prime Commercial Space for Lease - Endless Possibilities on Main Avenue  Located on one of Norwalk's busiest commercial corridors, this highly visible property offers exceptional exposure, dedicated on-site parking, and convenient access to Route 7, I-95, and the Merritt Parkway.  The street-level space is perfectly suited for a grab-and-go concept such as a bagel shop, coffee shop, cafe, bakery, deli, juice or smoothie bar, ice cream shop, specialty food market, or other quick-service food business (subject to approvals). Its storefront visibility and steady daily traffic make it an ideal location to attract commuters, nearby employees, and local residents.  The space is also an excellent fit for a variety of other commercial uses including medical or dental offices, chiropractic or physical therapy practices, salons, barber shops, med spas, esthetics studios, boutique retail, real estate, mortgage, insurance or law offices, accounting firms, pet grooming, fitness or yoga studios, creative workspaces, and professional offices.  Whether you're opening a new business, expanding your brand, or relocating to a prime commercial location, this versatile space offers the visibility, accessibility, and flexibility to help your business succeed.
